name: PureRay Corporation
summary: PureRay Corporation develops and manufactures solar-based charging and lighting systems. The company offers a self-contained and solar-powered lighting and charging solution that consists of a charging station, a solar panel, and a set of three energy-efficient LED light bulbs. Its solution could power LED light bulbs, as well as other appliances, such as fans, radios, TVs, and cell phones. The company provides its products to customers in the United States, as well as in developing countries in Africa, South Asia, the Caribbean, and Latin America. PureRay Corporation was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia.
